description_long: This is a medium-sized, woven handbag with a wide, gently flared body and two sturdy, rounded handles. The main body is a warm yellow color, featuring a prominent blue floral lace pattern that diagonally sweeps across the front and back surfaces. The woven texture is clearly visible, giving the bag a natural, artisanal appearance. The handles are thick and appear to be made from the same woven material as the body, attached securely at the top. There is a small, rectangular patch near the bottom corner, possibly a decorative or brand element, and a tiny butterfly motif adds a whimsical touch. The interior is spacious and open, with no visible lining or closure mechanism.
description: A yellow woven handbag with blue floral lace pattern, two rounded handles, and a small decorative patch with a butterfly motif.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue floral lace pattern, both handles, and the small patch with butterfly motif on the lower left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bag's depth, the woven texture, and the handles' attachment points.
description_view_2: Back view mirroring the front, with the blue floral lace pattern and handles visible, but the patch is less prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bag's depth and woven construction, with the floral pattern wrapping around.
attribute_brand_logo: A small rectangular patch with a butterfly motif is visible on the lower left front; no distinct brand logo.
attribute_strap_type: Two short, rounded, fixed handles made from woven material, attached at the top of the bag.
attribute_closure_mechanism: No visible closure mechanism; the bag appears to have an open top.
attribute_decorative_elements: Blue floral lace pattern across the body and a small butterfly motif on a patch.
attribute_pattern: Blue floral lace pattern on a yellow woven background.
